defects.desc: Hero heading font-size appears slightly reduced on the RIGHT — 'More than authentication, Complete User Management' is noticeably smaller than the LEFT at the same viewport width
Overall hero section vertical padding/height is compressed on the RIGHT, leaving substantially more dark-gray dead space below the CTA buttons before the page ends
Body/subheading paragraph text below the main heading appears slightly smaller and tighter on the RIGHT
CTA button 'Start building for free' appears marginally narrower/shorter on the RIGHT, though color and label are correct
